channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: More trash, 10th April
item.description:
One day late

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 10th April
item.description:
Graffiti on road sign in middle of road next to railway bridge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No tax or mot, 10th April
item.description:
Van has no tax and last mot was June 2025
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Merriman Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste wood, 10th April
item.description:
Opposite 14 fontenelle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 10th April
item.description:
Despite being reported twice recently on fix my street and a phone call to the council, the light is still not working. This light was replaced recently as apart of of modernisation program but is not working although one of your previous responses says it is.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albyfield, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 39 Briardale Gardens, 10th April
item.description:
Pavement blocked by builders rubbish and men working making it impossible for pedestrians too pass
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Briardale Gardens, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal strips on Seal Street E8, 10th April
item.description:
Hello, please can you remove the dumped metal strips which are still on Seal Street E8. These are sharp and could cause injury Many thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seal Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 registration plates dumped, 10th April
item.description:
2 plates left on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookmead Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This area of the street., 10th April
item.description:
Speed of large vehicles is shaking the houses alone carleton Gardens. It is causing micro issues with walls, meaning cracks are appearing on houses because of this traffic. I sent out a request 2 weeks ago, without a response.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Brecknock Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public Tree needs pruning, 10th April
item.description:
This tree is on desperate need of pruning. It block all sunlight and the roots will be close if not on the prpperty. I am also concerned about heave.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the road outside 42a Cavendish Road NW6, 10th April
item.description:
A broken wooden bench has been dumped on the road outside No. 42

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cavendish Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Southwark cleaning flytipping, 10th April
item.description:
Southwark cleaning have left two blue bags on the street, one of which is now ripped open for its contents to return once more to the street, which haven't been collected

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Danby Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs pruning, 10th April
item.description:
It's overgrown, blocking pavement and street space

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Southwark cleaning bag left on the street, 10th April
item.description:
Southwark cleaning team often leave bags of rubbish on the pavement for days. This one has been here for at least seven days. It would be great if the council could organise the putting of rubbish in a bag and the collection of it on the same day, rather than leaving an example for all to see that shows that Southwark council practise fly tipping themselves.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Copleston Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wet Cement, 10th April
item.description:
Wet cement entering road outside 18 Elwill Way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Elwill Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge freezer, 10th April
item.description:
Just noticed, from an upstairs window, a dumped silver fridge freezer, leaning against a bus stop shelter. The bus stop is right outside Qubit Interiors, Thames Rd, Crayford. Unsure how long it's been there busy pretty recent I think as haven't noticed it until just now. Could be dangerous if kids start playing with it, or it toppled over on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thames Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Truck dumped debris, 10th April
item.description:
A truck going past dumped a lot of debris on the road we’ve swept it to the side of the road so it’s out of the road as best we can.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deals Gateway, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of broken glass on Circus Street, 10th April
item.description:
On the corner of Greenwich South Street and Circus Street there is a large amount of broken glass all over the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich South Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken chairs and cushions dimpled in the entrance and communal gardening St Vincent House, 10th April
item.description:
Broken chairs and cushions dimpled in the entrance and communal gardening St Vincent House, they have been there for at least a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Grange Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgraceful Fly Tipping, 10th April
item.description:
I suggest checking the new CCTV nearby To try and catch the offender.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durlston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
